result.stderr:
ADOSCloneAllRepos 0.1.1
Copyright (C) 2026 https://github.com/realrubberduckdev/azure-devops-clone-all-repos

  -c, --collection-uri    Required. Azure collection e.g.
                          https://dev.azure.com/sample-organization-name/

  -u, --user-name         Required. AzureDevOps username e.g.
                          username@microsoft.com

  -p, --pat               Required. Personal Access Token (PAT) for the Git
                          repositories

  -o, --output-path       Required. Folder to clone repositories into e.g.
                          C:\ClonedRepos

  --help                  Display this help screen.

  --version               Display version information.
